title: Regional Gift Options
description: What unique, locally‑produced gifts from the Manche region are available for immediate purchase or as an e‑gift card for a last‑minute present?
narrative: The user is looking for gift ideas that showcase the cultural and artisanal heritage of the Manche (Channel) territory – such as oyster kits, local food products, ready‑to‑wear items, or wellness accessories from the AttitudeManche shop – and that can be obtained quickly (online ordering, digital delivery, or rapid shipping). Relevant results should highlight locally sourced products, describe their regional significance, and indicate availability of e‑gift cards or fast‑track purchase options suitable for a last‑minute buyer.

title: Carrot Zaâlouk
description: What is a traditional Moroccan carrot-based zaâlouk recipe and which restaurants serve it?
narrative: The user is seeking a authentic or commonly accepted carrot variation of the Moroccan starter zaâlouk, including ingredients, preparation steps, and serving tips. Additionally, the user wants recommendations for Moroccan restaurants that feature this carrot-based starter or similar vegetable appetizers on their menus. Relevant content must discuss carrot variants of zaâlouk, compare them to the classic eggplant version, and provide restaurant listings or reviews that mention such dishes.

title: Lotus Evora 400 specs
description: What are the detailed specifications, performance figures, and price of the Lotus Evora 400 model?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive technical information about the Lotus Evora 400, including engine power, torque, weight, 0‑60 acceleration, top speed, optional equipment, weight‑reduction measures, and current market price. Relevant passages are those that describe the Evora 400’s specifications, performance test results, official Lotus announcements, and pricing details. Documents that only mention other Lotus models, unrelated car brands, tuning files for different engines, or forum chatter about wheel centres are not relevant.

title: Thermomix Veal Blanquette
description: How can I prepare a traditional French blanquette de veau using a Thermomix while keeping the authentic taste and technique?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step Thermomix recipe for blanquette de veau that mirrors the classic French method. Relevant documents should include ingredient lists (e.g., veal shoulder, carrots, butter, flour, egg yolks, white wine), preparation steps (blanching, bouquet garni, sauce roux, liaison), cooking times, Thermomix settings (temperature, speed, Varoma), and tips for preserving the traditional white sauce. Information on possible variations, difficulty level, and wine pairings is also useful. Documents that merely mention veal dishes without Thermomix instructions or that describe unrelated recipes are not relevant.

title: Solar Protection Options
description: What solar‑protection products exist for car windshields and building facades, and how do they compare regarding energy savings, outward visibility, and durability?
narrative: The user is researching ways to shield both vehicle interiors and building exteriors from solar heat while preserving view and durability. Relevant documents should describe automotive solutions such as windshield curtains, treatments, and sun‑visors (e.g., Norauto and MS'DEBOSS offerings) and architectural solutions such as Schüco sun‑protection systems (ALB slats, CSB/CTB blinds, SageGlass® dynamic glazing, etc.). A relevant result must provide technical details on energy‑saving performance, transparency percentages, wind‑speed resistance, installation method, and any quantitative claims (e.g., reduction of AC energy, years of protection).

title: Smallest Circumnav Vessel
description: What is the smallest sailing vessel that has completed a global circumnavigation, and is it considered a ship or a boat?
narrative: The user seeks factual information about the record‑holding sailing vessel that achieved a world circumnavigation with the minimal length, including its name, dimensions, and dates of the voyage. In addition, the user wants clarification on how maritime terminology classifies such a vessel—as a ship or a boat—based on standard definitions, length thresholds, and usage conventions. Relevant results must mention the 9.73 m vessel of Jacques Riguidel (Frequency Jazz), its voyage timeline, and discussion of ship vs. boat distinctions (e.g., length limits, tonnage, and contextual usage).

title: VTC Driver Regulations
description: What are the legal requirements, licensing steps, and tax obligations for operating a passenger‑car (VTC) service in France, especially when income comes from collaborative‑economy platforms?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on French VTC (transport with driver) regulations: the minimum vehicle criteria, driver qualifications, required professional cards, and the procedural timeline for obtaining them, as outlined in Decree No. 2009‑1652. In addition, the user wants to understand how income earned from VTC services via collaborative platforms is taxed under the 2017 Finance Act and related social‑security contributions. Relevant documents include the decree text on driver fitness, licensing, and the collaborative‑economy tax summary.

title: Economic Warfare School
description: What programs, curriculum details, and enrollment procedures does the French School of Economic Warfare provide for students interested in crisis management, OSINT, and strategic intelligence?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the School of Economic Warfare, including the list of offered modules (e.g., crisis management analysis, information gathering, data science, cybersecurity), the educational levels (BTS, licence, master, doctorate), the purpose of the school, and the steps required to register (online form, required personal data, contact points). Documents that describe the school’s manifesto, the registration form, and the fields of interest are considered relevant, while unrelated news about heatwaves, Ukraine, or gaming forums are not.

title: Simplified Account Features
description: What functionalities does a simplified personal space on pole-emploi.fr provide, and how does it differ from a full job‑seeker account?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive comparison between the simplified (non‑jobseeker) personal space and the full job‑seeker account on Pôle Emploi. Relevant information must detail the registration steps for each account type, the required personal data, and the specific services available under the simplified account (e.g., job search, CV posting, training lookup) as well as its limitations (no unemployment benefit updates, no counselor appointments, no RIB collection, inability to receive allowances). Documents that explain how a user can upgrade from a simplified to a full account and any associated procedural nuances are also relevant.

title: Client Portal Comparison
description: What features, security measures, and available services are provided by the online client spaces of LMP Builder, Veolia Water, AXA Insurance, and Foncia?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about each provider’s client portal, including how to create an account, login procedures, types of actions users can perform (e.g., bill payment, project tracking, contract management, property management), and any security or authentication features mentioned. Relevant documents must describe these functionalities for LMP’s building project space, Veolia Water’s water‑service portal, AXA’s insurance client area, and Foncia’s real‑estate MyFoncia area. Documents that only mention the companies without portal details are not relevant.

title: Hybrid vs Electric
description: How do the Volvo V60 plug‑in hybrid diesel and a typical electric city car compare in terms of CO₂ emissions, operating cost per kilometre, range and practical suitability for daily urban commutes of under 50 km?
narrative: The user is looking for a side‑by‑side evaluation of a diesel‑based plug‑in hybrid (the Volvo V60 Hybrid Rechargeable) and a conventional battery‑electric city vehicle (e.g., a Smart Fortwo‑type electric car) for everyday city driving. Relevant information must include quantitative CO₂ emissions (g/km), fuel or electricity consumption and cost per kilometre, usable electric‑only range, total driving range, charging time and infrastructure requirements, as well as any performance trade‑offs such as acceleration or driving pleasure. Documents that discuss the V60’s 49 g/km emissions, 1.9 L/100 km fuel use, 50 km electric‑only range, cost of electricity per 10 km, and its hybrid‑power modes, as well as articles on electric‑car operating costs, charging limitations, maintenance advantages, and urban restrictions for non‑electric cars, are all considered relevant. A document should be deemed relevant if it provides any of these metrics or practical considerations for urban commuters.

title: Potato Post‑Crop Rotation
description: Which crops should be planted after harvesting potatoes to restore soil nutrients and limit pest carry‑over?
narrative: The user seeks agronomic guidance on selecting follow‑up crops after a potato field, emphasizing low nutrient‑demanding species, avoidance of root or nitrogen‑intensive leafy vegetables, inclusion of green‑manure options, and strategies to minimize residual potato pests such as late blight and Colorado potato beetle.

title: Twilight Phases and Moths
description: What are the civil, nautical, and astronomical twilight definitions, and how are these nighttime phases relevant for studying nocturnal moth biodiversity?
narrative: The user seeks a concise explanation of the three twilight categories (civil, nautical, astronomical) with their solar angle ranges, and wants to understand how these distinct periods of low light influence the activity and observation of nocturnal moth species. Relevant documents are those that describe the Earth's day‑night cycle, the specific angular definitions of twilight, and the extensive list of moth species that exemplify nocturnal biodiversity. Documents that only mention unrelated spiritual practices or literary excerpts are not relevant.

title: Mental Disability Employment
description: What strategies and programs help French companies integrate and retain employees with mental health disorders?
narrative: The user is looking for information on practical approaches, policies, and case studies that facilitate the hiring, accommodation, and return‑to‑work of workers with mental health conditions in France. Relevant material includes reports on OETH and Vivre’s partnership sessions, the design and evaluation of integrated return‑to‑work programmes, company testimonies (e.g., Areva, Schwing‑Stetter), and guidance documents that address employer responsibilities, available aids, and best‑practice interventions for maintaining employment of people with mental disabilities.

title: Legacy Initiatives
description: What recent projects or programs titled 'Legacy' exist in film, documentary, and sports/community contexts, and what are their purposes and outcomes?
narrative: The user is interested in understanding how the term "Legacy" is being used for contemporary initiatives across different domains. Relevant material should describe a project that carries "Legacy" in its title, explain its content, goals, and impact, and provide concrete details such as release information, audience reception, or funding objectives. Documents that discuss the documentary "Legacy, Our Legacy" by Yann Arthus‑Bertrand, the NBA All‑Star 2021 "Legacy Initiative" for youth‑serving nonprofits, and the film "Tron: Legacy" (including its box‑office performance) satisfy these criteria. Any source that merely mentions the word "legacy" without describing a specific titled project or its objectives is not considered relevant.

title: Ukrainian athletes war response
description: What public statements and actions have Ukrainian Olympic athletes, particularly Sergei Bubka, made in reaction to the Russian invasion of Ukraine?
narrative: The user is looking for information on how Ukrainian members of the Olympic movement have reacted to the war, including any social‑media posts, speeches, or mobilization efforts; specifically the tweet by Sergei Bubka saying “we will win,” the IOC’s request for humanitarian‑aid coordination, and any subsequent involvement of athletes in the conflict. Relevant results should mention Bubka’s statements, the IOC letter, and other Ukrainian athletes’ wartime activities, while ignoring unrelated content about verb conjugations, climate distrust, or insurance estimation.

title: Rural Energy Financing
description: What financing models and case studies exist for developing renewable energy projects in French rural territories?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on how renewable energy projects are funded and financially structured in rural France, especially mechanisms that create a virtuous financial loop benefiting the local territory. Materials that only mention the workshop title without substantive content on financing, or that focus on unrelated topics (e.g., dance performances, vintage cars, dream interpretation) are not relevant.

title: Sautéed Potato Timing
description: How long should raw potatoes be sautéed to achieve a fully cooked interior and a nicely browned exterior?
narrative: The user wants practical, detailed guidance on cooking raw (uns boiled) sautéed potatoes, including the optimal cooking time, heat level, potato size and variety, and visual or tactile cues for doneness. Relevant documents are those that discuss cooking times (e.g., 15‑20 minutes), the effect of potato size, the distinction between raw sautéed and pre‑boiled potatoes, recommended heat settings, and tips for achieving a crispy crust while keeping the interior tender.

title: Volcanic Photo Search
description: What high‑resolution images of volcanic activity, especially molten sulfur casts at Kawah Ijen, are available in the Novapix photographic agency collection?
narrative: The user is looking for photographs of volcanoes from the Novapix agency, focusing on images that show molten sulfur casting at Kawah Ijen in Java, Indonesia. narrative: The user wants detailed, step‑by‑step instructions for accessing the Total Direct Energy “My Account” portal, including how to locate the customer reference, log in (or recover a forgotten password), navigate to the “My bills” or similar section, and download or print a proof of domicile. title: Kia Rondo 2012
description: Find used 2012 Kia Rondo listings in Quebec that have under 100,000 km, automatic transmission, Bluetooth, and are priced below $10,000 with a warranty.
narrative: The user is looking to purchase a 2012 Kia Rondo minivan in the Quebec region. title: Gaul Heritage
description: Where can I find contemporary French sites, festivals, and publications that celebrate or reconstruct Gaulish culture and history?
narrative: The user is looking for up‑to‑date information on places, events and media in France that present Gaulish heritage. title: Winnipeg Luxury Rental
description: What luxury car rental options, daily rates, and driver‑age requirements are available in downtown Winnipeg?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on luxury‑class car rentals in downtown Winnipeg, including the names of rental companies, vehicle models (e.g., Nissan Maxima, Chrysler 300C), daily prices, any promotional rates, pick‑up locations (downtown, airport, Marion Street), minimum driver age, youth driver surcharges, fuel policies, insurance options, and cancellation/modification terms. title: Nantes Commercial Rental
description: What retail or office spaces are currently available for rent in the centre of Nantes, France, and what are their size, price, location details, and key amenities?
narrative: The user is seeking up‑to‑date listings of commercial premises for lease in the central area of Nantes (Loire‑Atlantique). title: Green Potato Poisoning
description: What health risks, symptoms, and safety measures are associated with consuming green or sprouted potatoes?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on the toxicity of green, sprouted, or rotten potatoes, including the chemical agents (e.g., solanine, glycoalkaloids), the symptoms of poisoning, recommended medical treatment, and practical prevention tips such as storage and handling. title: Beaune Wine Tourism

narrative: The user is planning a trip to the Beaune area and wants comprehensive information on wine tourism opportunities. description: Where can I buy a high‑quality, slip‑resistant boat shoe made in France, and what are the cleaning, waterproofing, and delivery options?

title: Renault Espace Reliability
description: What common mechanical problems and reliability concerns are reported for Renault Grand Espace models built between 2006 and 2010, particularly those equipped with the 2.0 L turbo engine?

title: Ajaccio Rental Terms
description: What are the typical daily price, cancellation policy, and insurance options for a compact/mid‑size car rental in Ajaccio for a driver aged 26‑65?
narrative: The user wants current, practical information about renting a compact or mid‑size car in Ajaccio, specifically the average daily cost, whether free cancellation is available (and the deadline), and what insurance (e.g., multi‑hazard, deductible‑free) options are offered for drivers between 26 and 65 years old. title: Rental Service Comparison
description: What are the key differences in price, mileage allowance, insurance coverage, and extra services among car rental providers in Reunion, Nianpan (China), Corfu (Greece), and Wrocław (Poland)?
narrative: The user wants a side‑by‑side comparison of car rental offers for four distinct locations mentioned in the documents. title: Lincoln Ideology Film

narrative: The user seeks information that identifies and explains the labor‑related and socialist ideas associated with Abraham Lincoln, especially as highlighted in critiques of the film. description: What legal remedies and compensation options are available to passengers injured in Uber rides?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive information on the rights and recourse for passengers involved in Uber‑related car crashes. title: Ergonomic Chair Comparison
description: Find ergonomic office chairs with adjustable armrests and headrests, suitable for long‑hour desk work, priced under €200.

title: Paris Silver Lab
description: Where can I find a silver (black‑and‑white) photographic laboratory in Paris that offers film development, printing, workshops, and sells equipment and chemicals?
narrative: The user is looking for a Paris‑based silver photography laboratory that provides a full suite of services: (1) development of black‑and‑white negatives in various formats (135, 120, sheet film), (2) printing options such as barium paper and RA4 colour prints, (3) educational workshops or open‑access lab time for members, and (4) a retail component selling silver‑based photographic supplies (film, paper, chemicals, hardware). A relevant answer should mention the lab’s location, membership or access policies, specific equipment (enlargers, dryers, chemicals), and the ability to purchase supplies on‑site.

title: Broken Dough Quiche

title: Ophir Shuttle Launch
description: What were the objectives, participants, and outcomes of the Ophir shuttle launch on July 16, 423 A.C.?

title: Fellboelin Lamp Restoration
description: How can I restore a 19th‑century moderator oil lamp equipped with a Fellboelin beak so that it functions correctly?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information on repairing or converting a historic moderator oil lamp that has been altered with a German‑made Fellboelin beak. title: Minorca Car Rental
description: What car‑rental providers operate in Minorca, what are their price ranges and vehicle categories for a specified pick‑up date and location, and what additional fees or requirements apply?

title: Organic Swiss Potatoes
description: What organic potato varieties are grown in Switzerland, and what are their cultivation practices, storage guidelines, and nutritional characteristics?
narrative: The user is interested in detailed information about potatoes produced organically in Switzerland. title: Senior Hiring Bonus
description: What are the conditions, amounts, and combined benefits of the French €2,000 bonus for hiring workers over 45, and how does it interact with other state supports such as Pôle Emploi subsidies and charge exemptions?
narrative: The user seeks official information on France's incentive program that provides a €2,000 bonus to employers hiring employees aged 45 or older.
